key_visual_elements: Marina Bay Sands hotel (three towers + sky park)

details.description: Daytime waterfront view across Marina Bay toward the Marina Bay Sands integrated resort in Singapore. Dominating the scene are three tall, blue‑glass hotel towers topped by the iconic boat‑shaped SkyPark with trees and an observation deck. In front at left is the white, lotus‑like ArtScience Museum with petal‑shaped forms. At the water’s edge are low, glass-and-steel structures and canopies belonging to The Shoppes/Expo area; a small faceted glass pavilion sits partly over the water. The bay’s calm surface reflects the skyline under a bright, slightly hazy blue sky with scattered clouds. The setting suggests the photo was taken from the opposite side of the bay along the Esplanade/Merlion waterfront promenade.

details.description: The image shows the iconic Singapore skyline across Marina Bay. In the foreground is calm water reflecting the bright daytime sky. Dominating the mid-ground are the three vertical, glass-clad towers of Marina Bay Sands, linked at the top by a long, cantilevered SkyPark that spans all three towers. In front of the towers sits the ArtScience Museum, a white lotus-inspired building with petal-like structures open toward the water. The scene is a classic Marina Bay composition, captured from across the bay, likely from the Esplanade/Marina Bay waterfront area, emphasizing contemporary, futuristic architecture and waterfront context.

details.description: A daytime view of the iconic Marina Bay Sands complex in Singapore, taken from across the water. The image is dominated by the three sloping glass hotel towers connected at the top by the boat-shaped Sands SkyPark. To the left, in the foreground of the towers, stands the distinctive white, lotus-shaped ArtScience Museum. The foreground is filled with the rippling dark water of Marina Bay, which offers a partial reflection of the architecture. To the right of the towers, the lower, curved rooflines of the convention center and shopping mall are visible. The sky is a clear, bright blue with scattered white clouds.

details.description: A daytime wide shot of the Marina Bay Sands hotel and the ArtScience Museum in Singapore, viewed across the water of Marina Bay. The Marina Bay Sands consists of three tall towers connected at the top by a long, boat-shaped sky park. The ArtScience Museum is a white, lotus-inspired building located at the base of the towers. The water in the foreground shows ripples and reflections of the buildings. The sky is blue with light, wispy clouds.

details.description: Daytime waterfront view across Marina Bay toward the Marina Bay Sands complex in Singapore. Three tall glass hotel towers rise side by side, topped by a long, boat‑shaped roof deck (the SkyPark) lined with greenery. In front and to the left stands the white, lotus‑inspired ArtScience Museum. Calm bay waters fill the foreground with reflections; clear sky above. Promenade and low‑rise mall structures sit at the base; a small glass pavilion on the water is visible to the right.

details.description: Daytime waterfront view of Singapore’s Marina Bay. The dominant subject is the Marina Bay Sands integrated resort: three dark-blue glass hotel towers connected at the top by the boat-shaped SkyPark with trees and an observation deck. In front-left of the towers sits the white, lotus-like ArtScience Museum with petal-shaped forms. Low, sleek podium structures and canopies of The Shoppes at Marina Bay Sands spread along the base. On the right over the water is a small faceted glass pavilion likely part of the Crystal Pavilions (Louis Vuitton Island Maison). The water of Marina Bay fills the foreground with reflections; lighting is bright with clear skies.

details.description: A waterfront view of Singapore's Marina Bay Sands complex: three tall, glass-clad towers with a horizontal SkyPark atop, creating a distinctive floating-outlined silhouette. In the foreground, the white ArtScience Museum resembles a blooming lotus with petal-like curves. The scene is set along the bay with calm water reflecting the structures, and a modern promenade area at the base.

details.description: A daytime view of the iconic Marina Bay Sands complex in Singapore, taken from across the water. The image is dominated by the three sloping glass skyscrapers of the hotel, connected at the top by the boat-shaped Sands SkyPark. To the left, in the foreground, sits the distinctive white, lotus-shaped ArtScience Museum. The calm waters of Marina Bay fill the lower portion of the frame, reflecting the buildings and the bright, partly cloudy sky above.

details.description: A daytime wide shot of the Marina Bay Sands resort and the ArtScience Museum in Singapore. The Marina Bay Sands consists of three massive glass-clad towers connected at the top by a long, boat-shaped cantilevered roof deck known as the Sands SkyPark. In the foreground to the left is the ArtScience Museum, a distinct white building with a lotus-inspired design. The structures are situated along the edge of Marina Bay, with their reflections visible in the water. The sky is clear blue with a few wispy clouds.

details.description: A waterfront Singapore cityscape featuring the iconic Marina Bay Sands hotel with its three vertical towers connected by a single elevated SkyPark on top. In the foreground is the lotus-inspired ArtScience Museum, a white sculptural building with petal-like bays. Calm water reflects the structures beneath a clear blue sky.

entities.notes: Architect: Moshe Safdie. Completed 2010. Features a cantilevered SkyPark spanning the three towers.
